name: speakout
description: Obsidian plugin for speaking Markdown source content tagged for reading view.

scripts.release: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run release:package
scripts.release:package: mkdir -p dist && cp manifest.json main.js styles.css dist/ && cd dist && zip -q speakout-${npm_package_version}.zip manifest.json main.js styles.css
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run release
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
